creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #1)

Hi,

thanks for tidying up my patch and the commit.

Regarding port maintenance, I can give it a try, I guess it's better me than noone. If I get into troubles with updates hopefully I will ask around and someone will jump in to help.

There's already 3.3.6, I'll test it and if it works ok I'll send a patch with updated MAINTAINER field.

Best regards,
